fields.name: Eau de Cologne
fields.description: Konsentrasi 2-5%, aroma segar dan ringan. Cocok untuk cuaca tropis.

fields.name: Eau de Parfum
fields.description: Konsentrasi tinggi 15-20%, aroma tahan lama hingga 8 jam. Cocok untuk acara formal dan malam hari.

fields.name: Eau de Toilette
fields.description: Konsentrasi 5-15%, aroma ringan dan segar. Cocok untuk penggunaan sehari-hari.

fields.name: Roll-On
fields.description: Parfum praktis dalam kemasan roll-on, mudah dibawa kemana saja.

fields.name: Citrus
fields.description: Keluarga aroma citrus

fields.name: Floral
fields.description: Keluarga aroma floral

fields.name: Fresh
fields.description: Keluarga aroma fresh

fields.name: Oriental
fields.description: Keluarga aroma oriental

fields.name: Woody
fields.description: Keluarga aroma woody

fields.name: Morris Black Edition – Amber 100 mL
fields.description: Amber manis jadi pusat, dengan fougere klasik : lavender + geranium, lalu woody vetiver.

fields.name: Morris Black Edition – Aquatic 100 mL
fields.description: Fresh dari Mint, Citrus & bergamot, watery vibe, ditutup dengan sentuhan Woody-Oud yang dalam.

fields.name: Sport Pulse
fields.description: Zesty mandarin, peppermint, and grapefruit. Perfect for active lifestyles and tropical heat.

fields.name: Morris Lavender
fields.description: French lavender with a touch of rosemary and bergamot. A timeless and elegant classic.

fields.name: Green Tea & Mint
fields.description: Japanese green tea blended with fresh mint and lemon zest. A calming and refreshing scent.

fields.name: Ocean Whisper
fields.description: Fresh marine accord with green melon and soft musk. Delivers a clean, crisp sensation all day long.

fields.name: Citrus Morning
fields.description: A burst of Mediterranean citrus, Italian lemon, and pink grapefruit. A light, invigorating scent perfect for daily wear.

fields.name: Amber Dusk
fields.description: Warm amber entwined with patchouli and white musk. Creates an unforgettable elegant and mysterious impression.

fields.name: Jasmine Royale
fields.description: Premium jasmine absolute fused with Madagascar vanilla and creamy sandalwood. A luxurious floral that lingers all day.

fields.name: Morris Noir
fields.description: A refined blend of black oud, Bulgarian rose, and warm amber. An elegant and mysterious masculine scent for formal evenings.
